name: Alpha Hpa Limited
analysis: A4N's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 15% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.8× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$0.8000. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.8600, stop A$0.7078, target A$1.3165 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
